reviews.comment:
EXCELENTE!, Por un error de tipeo me cobraron con la tarjeta muchisimo mas de lo que habia cargado, a la semana me di cuenta del error,  me logre comunicar a traves del Camping del ACA y se comunicaron conmigo para pedir disculpas y me devolvieron el excedente. BUENA GENTE.

(Translated by Google)
EXCELLENT! Due to a typo, I was charged much more than I had loaded onto my card. I realized the mistake a week later, contacted the ACA campground, and they apologized and refunded the excess. GREAT PEOPLE.

reviews.comment:
Quedás encajado en zona Playa Grande, muy de noche y fuera de temporada. Prometen enviarte ayuda en una hora... Y pasa menos de media hora y ya está el auxilio rescatándote. Muy atento, conocedor de su oficio, te espera hasta que llegues a la principal. Un genio!!!

(Translated by Google)
You're stuck in the Playa Grande area, late at night and out of season. They promise to send help within the hour... And less than half an hour passes, and help is already there rescuing you. Very attentive, knowledgeable in his trade, he waits for you until you reach the main road. A genius!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tNMlNGQXlTbWh3VFMxNmRrOU1UMk5LTW5wUmNHYxAB
